thor_backlog.derived_from: manual compiled handoff needed again for FINAL-PR-02
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Add compiler that emits repo cognition summary, handoff request, compiled handoff, validator expectations, return contract, and next-worker packet for each FINAL-PR.

thor_backlog.derived_from: UI IDs had to be listed manually in compiled handoff
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Add UI contract section to compiled handoffs for UI-touching PRs. List required IDs and copy verbatim.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Scope control is working but relies on worker knowing rules
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Emit scope violation markers as validator checks in compiled handoff. Scope drift fails validator, not just code review.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Worker must know claim boundary rules; no automatic reminder
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Thor emits forbidden_claim_phrases_for_this_pr section in compiled handoff. Worker checks before finalizing docs.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Y and Mjolnir profiles not useful for UI/demo PRs
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Add profile-specific output contracts: Generic for UI/demo, Y for model selection, Mjolnir for security review.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Validator acceptance gates match compiled handoff gates exactly
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Thor auto-generates validator stub code from acceptance gate list in compiled handoff.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Worker packet manually created each time
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Thor produces next worker packet automatically from prior return report.

thor_backlog.derived_from: Token economy improvement potential not quantified
thor_backlog.recommended_change: Add repo-cognition budget reporting: files read, files avoided, why. Track across FINAL-PR ladder.
